headline: Citron Research Says 'Bull Case Won' On Credit Acceptance
summary: Citron Research turned bullish on Credit Acceptance Corporation (NASDAQ: CACC) Wednesday, citing resolved regulatory threats, aggressive buybacks, and an AI-driven lending platform under CEO Vinayak Hegde.

raw.headline: Citron Research Says 'Bull Case Won' On Credit Acceptance

headline: Big investors have been fleeing for-sale housing market, even before Trump ordered ban
summary: President Donald Trump wants to ban big investors from buying single-family rental homes, but investors have already been selling due to high home prices.

raw.headline: Big investors have been fleeing for-sale housing market, even before Trump ordered ban
raw.summary: President Donald Trump wants to ban big investors from buying single-family rental homes, but investors have already been selling due to high home prices.

headline: Truist Securities Initiates Coverage On NVR with Hold Rating, Announces Price Target of $7700
summary: Truist Securities  analyst Jonathan Bettenhausen   initiates coverage on NVR (NYSE:NVR) with a Hold rating and announces Price Target of $7700.
